title: Product sync — 2026-02-07
text:
# Weekly Product Sync — 2026-02-07
Attendees: PM, Eng Lead, CS Lead

## Discussion
- BlueOrbit Media escalated Mobile App problems again; churn risk flagged.
- Repeated ask for 'SSO/SAML support' across accounts.
- Eng notes Mobile App generates the most support load this month.

## Action items
- [ ] Evaluate 'SSO/SAML support' for roadmap.
- [ ] Investigate Mobile App performance regressions.
- [ ] Follow up with BlueOrbit Media.
